reasons: Required 0013 result JSON, summary markdown, internal short-paper draft, and artifact directory are present; schema and declared-artifact validation passed.
The result records a draft-only iteration with no new learning compute, neural framework, GPU run, larger environment, or broad sweep.
The draft separates estimator claims, vector-SSM correctness claims, and auxiliary-goal negative evidence, with main claims mapped to iterations 0001-0012.

The strongest positive claim is appropriately scoped to small audited tabular or CPU NumPy settings, normalized-Q scaling, terminal-sampling variance reduction, and adequate-coverage learning improvements.

The auxiliary result is appropriately scoped as negative evidence for the tested rank-4 low-rank FourRooms architecture, optimizer, replay setup, gamma, and repair variants; it does not generalize to all auxiliary goals.
The draft includes RiverSwim coverage caveats, matched-stream limitations, uniform-reset-replay limitations, unsupported-claims red lines, and a pre-publication review checklist.
Automatic continuation should stop because the draft is explicitly marked internal_review_required and external use requires review.
risk_flags: This is an internal draft and synthesis artifact, not new empirical evidence.
External publication or broader claims require explicit review against the included checklist.
Positive estimator claims remain limited to small CPU tabular or CPU NumPy settings with audited reward normalization and terminal masks.
RiverSwim learning advantages remain coverage-qualified; coverage-starved settings should not be cited as learning-superiority evidence.
The auxiliary negative result is limited to the tested rank-4 FourRooms low-rank setup, replay construction, gamma, optimizer, and predeclared repair diagnostics.
